title: ANIMAL SHELTER AND ADOPTION SERVICES - 211info
text: HUMANE SOCIETY OF EASTERN OREGON PET RESCUE ANIMAL SHELTER AND ADOPTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers animal adoption, shelter services, and animal surrender. 1844 NW Geer Road Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 11am-3pm (closed major holidays) Email (541) 564-6222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 564-6222 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Visit website for a full list of fees. FEES: -Adoption: Dogs are $125 and up, depending on breed and age, and cats and kittens are $30. In cases where the animal is not spayed/neutered before adoption, $50 will be refunded off the dog adoption fee and $20 off the cat adoption fee if done within 60 days of adoption. -Animal surrender: Dog (owned or stray) $100, cat $15 -Animal shelter/impound: Varies DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Aminal shelter/impound: City of Hermiston All other services: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HUMANE SOCIETY OF EASTERN OREGON PET RESCUE
